resources.string: ∆Ühyew %1$.1f¬į%2$s ak…Ē fam akodu wo anohyeto a …õy…õ %3$.1f¬į%2$s
a woreb…Ē mm…Ēden s…õ wob…õtwe data.txt afi wo server so
K…Ēk…Ēb…Ē: S…õ wob…õma atifi h…Ē nhyehy…õe no atumi ay…õ adwuma a, ebetumi ama wo batere no ayow nt…õmnt…õm sen s…õnea …õtaa y…õ no
Nne…õma a W…Ēde Y…õ Nne…õma a W…Ēahy…õ Da Ay…õ
S…õ wop…õ a: URL a w…Ēahy…õ da ay…õ
Custom URL no nny…õ set, anaas…õ …õy…õ blank. Wubetumi ak…Ē nhyehy…õe mu de URL a w…Ēahy…õ da ay…õ aka ho
Mfomso bi sii bere a na w…Ēreb…Ē mm…Ēden s…õ w…Ēb…õma dwuma a w…Ēde di no ay…õ foforo
Entumi mfa %1$s data no ne %2$s data no nkabom
antumi anni ns…õm a w…Ēahy…õ ho nk…Ēm ho dwuma ho dwuma
Entumi anni wim tebea ho ns…õm a efi wo server no so no ho dwuma yiye, titiriw %1$s data no
Hyehy…õ URL no w…Ē wo nhyehy…õe mu.TXT
Ns…õm a W…Ēab…Ē ho Nk…Ēmhy…õ Kratafa
Forecast Type \'%1$s\' no ny…õ adwuma, hw…õ wo settings fael no na s…Ē hw…õ bio
Nk…Ēmhy…õ URL no Nsiesie, Sesa Settings.txt na sesa
W…Ēay…õ saa app yi updated nanso server a worey…õ connecting no nnyaa inigo plugin no foforo mma Weewx. Ebia fields rentumi nkyer…õ yiye kosi s…õ weewx no b…õba foforo
Update interval no ny…õ adwuma, update nhyehy…õe na afei san s…Ē hw…õ
%1$s no seesei hwehw…õ %2$s data fael a …õfiri %3$s server, …õhia s…õ wo sesa %4$s na wo y…õ %5$s fael no fofor…Ē ansa na app yi ay…õ adwuma yie. Klik Ok na woanya ns…õm pii w…Ē %6$s ho
Manual Update Set, Swipe Refresh Screen no na fa wo ho hy…õ mu
∆Ühyew %1$.1f¬į%2$s ak…Ē soro akodu wo anohyeto a …õy…õ %3$.1f¬į%2$s
∆Üsram a edi h…Ē no mu ns…õm a esisi?
W…Ēnny…õ download anaa app no ‚Äč‚Äčho nhyehy…õe biara
∆źho hia s…õ w…Ēb…Ē wo amanne…õ na w…Ēab…Ē wo k…Ēk…Ē bere a …Ēhyew, osut…Ē anaa osut…Ē dodow du anohyeto a wode asi h…Ē no ho no
Esiane s…õ wopow notification permission no mprenu nti, …õs…õ s…õ wo ma …õy…õ adwuma w…Ē nhyehy…õe mu mmom, fi ase nhyehy…õe?
Y…õsr…õ s…õ tw…õn bere a y…õrehw…õ s…õ URL a wode k…Ēe no y…õ nokware no
Radar mfonini no da so ara retwe
Radar type \'%1$s\' ny…õ adwuma, hw…õ wo settings fael no na s…Ē hw…õ bio
Radar URL no ny…õ nea w…Ēde asi h…Ē. Wubetumi ak…Ē nhyehy…õe ahorow mu ak…Ēsesa
B…Ē k…Ēk…Ē da biara da bere a osu no adu nea woahy…õ no so no
Osuo %1$.2f%2$s ne wo anohyeto…Ē a …õy…õ %3$.2f%2$s no ahyia
Osuo %1$.1f%2$s ne wo anohyeto…Ē a …õy…õ %3$.1f%2$s no ahyia
Osuo dodo…Ē a …õy…õ %1$.2fin w…Ē %2$d %3$s a atwam no mu no ak…Ē \'Severe\' level
Osuo dodo…Ē a …õy…õ %1$.2fin w…Ē %2$d %3$s a atwam no mu no ak…Ē \'K…Ēk…Ēb…Ē\' gyinabea
Osuo dodo…Ē a …õy…õ %1$.2fin w…Ē %2$d %3$s a atwam no mu no ak…Ē \'Watch\' level
Osuo a …õt…Ē %1$.1fmm w…Ē %2$d %3$s a atwam no mu no ak…Ē \'Severe\' level
Osuo a …õt…Ē %1$.1fmm w…Ē %2$d %3$s a atwam no mu no ak…Ē \'K…Ēk…Ēb…Ē\' gyinabea
Osuo a …õt…Ē %1$.1fmm w…Ē %2$d %3$s a atwam no mu no ak…Ē \'Watch\' level
Osu a ∆źt…Ē So K…õse Ho K…Ēk…Ēb…Ē?
∆źb…Ē k…Ēk…Ē s…õ osu dodow boro anohyeto a emu y…õ den a egyina bere tenten a osu t…Ē so
Osu a ∆źt…Ē So K…õse Ho K…Ēk…Ēb…Ē
∆źb…Ē k…Ēk…Ē s…õ osu dodow boro k…Ēk…Ēb…Ē anohyeto a egyina bere tenten a osu t…Ē so
∆źb…Ē k…Ēk…Ē s…õ osu dodow boro …Ēw…õn anohyeto a egyina bere tenten a osu t…Ē so
Paw bere a w…Ēde y…õ foforo
Wogye di s…õ wop…õ s…õ wuyi data nyinaa fi h…Ē?
Sie App Debug Ns…õm a W…Ēakyer…õw
Da so ara retwe nk…Ēmhy…õ data
∆źb…Ē k…Ēk…Ē kodu mprenu da biara bere a …Ēhyew no adu wo anohyeto a woahy…õ no so no
Set to manual updates, nanso content cache biara nni h…Ē de besi nn…õ
W…Ēde URL no sii h…Ē s…õ default anaas…õ na hwee nni mu
Fa update times a …õy…õ p…õp…õ…õp…õ di dwuma
Na ontumi nk…Ē anaas…õ woantwe amfi custom URL a w…Ēakyer…õ no mu
Na ontumi nk…Ēka anaas…õ …Ēntwe nk…Ēmhy…õ no
Na ontumi mfa radar= mfonini mfi Intan…õt so anaas…õ …Ēntwe
Na ontumi mfa nhyehy…õe no nk…Ē anaas…õ …Ēntwe mfi wo server no so
Na ontumi mfa webcam mfonini bi nk…Ē anaas…õ …Ēntwe mfi wo server so
Wontumi ntwe %1$s no efis…õ na URL no y…õ blank
Webcam mfonini no da so ara retwe
Webcam URL no ny…õ nea w…Ēahyehy…õ anaas…õ …õny…õ hwee
Anka updated nanso wifi connection no nni h…Ē
